name: MSI Installation From Web
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Stamatis Chatzimangou
SIGMA Title: MSI Installation From Web
SIGMA Description: Detects installation of a remote msi file from web.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msiinstaller%' AND ("Event ID" IN('1040', '1042')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY MSI Installation From Web on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msiinstaller%' AND ("Event ID" IN('1040', '1042')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%://%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: MSI Installation From Web
